howItWorksPage.title: How Dropshipping Works
howItWorksPage.intro: This store demonstrates the dropshipping e-commerce model — a supply chain method where the store never holds inventory. Here's the flow:
howItWorksPage.step1Desc: You browse our curated collection and place an order through our store, just like any e-commerce experience.
howItWorksPage.step2Desc: We forward your order details to our vetted supplier on AliExpress, Alibaba, or Amazon at the wholesale price.
howItWorksPage.step3Desc: The supplier ships the product directly to your address. We never touch the inventory.
howItWorksPage.step4Desc: Your product arrives at your doorstep. The margin between source and retail price is our revenue.
howItWorksPage.courseIntro: This store was built as a practical demonstration for a FinTech course. Here's how it connects to key concepts:
howItWorksPage.concept1Desc: This store demonstrates how digital platforms eliminate traditional warehousing. By connecting directly to global suppliers via AliExpress and Alibaba, we showcase a lean supply chain where inventory risk is transferred to the supplier, order fulfillment is automated, and the store operator focuses purely on marketing and curation.
howItWorksPage.concept2Desc: The markup from source price to retail price (visible in Transparency Mode) illustrates how dropshipping margins work. Unlike traditional retail with 2-3x markups, dropshippers balance competitive pricing against marketing costs, platform fees, and shipping — making margin analysis a core competency.
howItWorksPage.concept3Desc: Each transaction involves cross-border payment flows: the customer pays in SAR, the store operator pays the supplier in USD/CNY. This demonstrates how FinTech payment gateways, currency conversion, and international settlement systems enable global micro-commerce.

checkoutPage.orderMessage: In a real dropshipping flow, this order is forwarded to the supplier, who ships directly to the customer.

aboutPage.title: About Maktabi
aboutPage.description: Maktabi is a curated workspace accessories store built as a practical demonstration of the dropshipping e-commerce model. Every product is sourced from global suppliers and delivered directly to customers — we never hold inventory.
aboutPage.mission: Our mission is to help you build a workspace that inspires focus and creativity, using carefully selected minimalist accessories from trusted global suppliers.
aboutPage.academic: This project was created as part of a FinTech course to demonstrate real-world e-commerce concepts including digital supply chains, margin analysis, and cross-border payment flows.
